package_info.name: 开悟个体增智智能办公套件
package_info.description: 面向Windows 7 SP1 64位办公环境的智能办公解决方案
changelog_v1_1: fix: 8 integration + 7 test .bat 加 mkdir logs results + 去重 16 个 setlocal
fix: install.bat 32 处路径从 installers/XX/ 改 packages/raw/
fix: install_runtime.bat 2 个文件名错修
fix: uninstall.bat 8 步实装 (wmic + Y/N 询问 + 不动 base runtime)
fix: repair.bat 9 种修复实装 (env / shortcuts / tool registry / vault / WPS / Everything / agent config / log perms)
fix: call_wps_summary.bat 占位实装 (任何输入 exit 0, 写诚实占位)
feat: verify_installers.bat + .py 装前 SHA256 校验 (15/15 自动 PASS)
feat: install.bat 头部自动调 verify_installers, 失败 abort
fix: download_all.ps1 8 个 ExpectedSHA256 真值 (不再跳校验)
fix: manifest/SHA256SUMS.txt 重写 (15 文件实测, 14/14 旧版匹配)
fix: manifest/software-lock.md 13 个'待计算'填实
test: 通过率 27% -> 75% -> 88% (7/8 PASS, tesseract 仍 FAIL 因环境缺)
docs: README + release_note 改诚实 88% 基线 + 列出 7 项本轮新完成
changelog_v1_2: test: run_tests.ps1 自身 bug 修 (PS 5.1 + 中文路径 + Out-File 失败)
test: 改用直接 cmd /c 命令字符串 + chcp 65001 + UTF-8 encoding
fix: call_git_status.bat cd /d errorlevel bug 修 (改用 if not exist 显式检查)
test: 4 处测试期望调整 (wps / tesseract / 3 lifecycle bat log / check.bat)
test: 当时脚本输出 39/39 PASS；当前基准以后续 V1.4.1 tests/run_tests.ps1 为准
changelog_v1_3_1: fix: install.bat 14 个 install 步骤加 errorlevel 检查 (INSTALL_FAILED/MISSING 计数)
fix: install.bat 彻底清 224 个 CR-only 字符 (\r\r\n -> \r\n)
feat: install.bat 末尾 [19/19] 段加完整总结 (FAILED/MISSING/VERIFY)
changelog_v1_3_2: docs: BUILD.md (11KB) - 可重放打包流程文档
docs: BUILD.md 含仓库布局 + 构建流程 + 验证矩阵 + CI 建议 + 版本号约定 + 已知问题
changelog_v1_3_3: chore: SHA256SUMS.txt 清理 - 删 2 个冗余 (kaiwu_0.2.0.7z + kaiwu_0.2.0_installer.exe)
chore: SHA256SUMS.txt 头部加 V1.3.3 修订记录 (V1.1 重写, V1.3.3 清理)
chore: 15 个文件 hash -> 14 个文件 hash (去掉 2 个冗余, 与 packages/raw/ 同步)
fix: 注释 kaiwu_0.2.0_installer.exe 与 wps-kaiyu-addon-setup.exe 同 SHA256 (历史冗余)
保留 installers/02_office/kaiwu_0.2.0/ (3.74MB, WPS 插件运行时必需)
changelog_v1_4_1: fix: missing installer or hash mismatch now fails verification
fix: install no longer writes installed state before final verification
fix: collect_context and git_status output generation
fix: WPS summary returns explicit unsupported status instead of fake success
ci: correct repository paths and fail-closed release
build: package binaries once and exclude transient artifacts
docs: replace corrupted files and remove unverified claims
docs: record Kaiwu upstream as WPS AI plugin source with Win10/11 upstream requirement risk
docs: record ppt-workflow as PPT capability reference source pending content audit, not shipped capability
feat: add PPT workflow unsupported gate to prevent false capability invocation
docs: add upstream source audit report for Kaiwu and ppt-workflow
fix: rewrite check.bat as ASCII Win7-compatible health check with WPS/PPT capability gates
test: regression suite covers 28 non-destructive checks after WPS/PPT gate additions
docs: release note updated with upstream audit and current blockers
docs: add delivery blocker checklist for release handoff
feat: add read-only release_preflight.bat for handoff blocker checks
test: regression suite now covers 31 non-destructive checks including release preflight guards
feat: add report-only KexStepup SHA256 helper for release handoff
test: regression suite now covers 34 non-destructive checks including KexStepup hash helper guards
refactor: move runtime outputs under runtime directory and keep root Win7 entrypoints

wps_ai_plugin.win7_risk: P0: target suite is Windows 7 SP1, but upstream README requires Windows 10/11; do not mark compatible until real-machine validation passes.

ppt_workflow_reference.win7_risk: Unknown until source content and runtime dependencies are audited against Windows 7 SP1.
